title: Earth Sect
content:
The Earth Sect is one of the 
Nine Sects and Thirteen Factions
 located on the 
Meng Earth Continent
 inside the 
Eastern Continent
 on the 
Immortal Astral Continent
. It runs the continent together with the 
Meng Earth Sect
.

Overview
[
]

Unlike most large sects, the Earth Sect only has around 30,000 disciples, as focus on quality rather than quantity.

Disciples are ranked from 1 to 9, depending on ability, there are as few as 100 Rank 9 disciples and about 20,000 Rank 1 disciples. As a box standard, the 5th Rank disciples appear to be around the Second Step's Nirvana Cleanser level. 

History
[
]

Book Twelve
[
]

Wang Lin
 visited the Earth Sect to get the map of the Meng Earth Continent. While there, he was pleasantly surprised to sense the aura of 
Zhou Yi
 and 
Qing Shuang
. He even informed the Earth Sect's Golden Exalt Ancestor to look after the two of them.
